title: AIIMS Guwahati Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 04 Project Research Scientist III, Project Nurse I and Other Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Guwahati (AIIMS Guwahati) has officially released the notification for the recruitment of 04 Project Research Scientist III, Project Technical Support III, and Project Nurse I jobs. Candidates with MD/ MS, DNB, Any Degree, post-graduation, B.Sc, MBBS, Ph.D, or ANM can use this chance and apply for the AIIMS Guwahati Notification 2026 . Here we have mentioned more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applic...
